OBJECT Codeunit 364 PostPurchLines-Delete
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=10/13/25;
    Time=[ 9:43:00 AM];
    Modified=Yes;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    Permissions=TableData 121=rd,
                TableData 123=d,
                TableData 125=d;
    OnRun=BEGIN
          END;

  }
  CODE
  {
    VAR
      PurchReceiptLine@1109400000 : Record 121;
      PurchInvLine@1109400001 : Record 123;
      PurchCrMemoLine@1109400002 : Record 125;
      PurchShptLine@1000 : Record 6651;

    PROCEDURE DeletePurchRcptLines@1(PurchReceiptHeader@1109400000 : Record 120);
    BEGIN
      PurchReceiptLine.SETRANGE("Document No.",PurchReceiptHeader."No.");
      // Start INC
      //WHILE PurchReceiptLine.FIND('-') DO BEGIN
      IF PurchReceiptLine.FIND('-') THEN
        REPEAT

          PurchReceiptLine.TESTFIELD("Quantity Invoiced",PurchReceiptLine.Quantity);
          PurchReceiptLine.DELETE;
      //END;
        UNTIL PurchReceiptLine.NEXT = 0;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE DeletePurchInvLines@2(PurchInvHeader@1109400000 : Record 122);
    BEGIN
      PurchInvLine.SETRANGE("Document No.",PurchInvHeader."No.");
      PurchInvLine.DELETEALL;
    END;

    PROCEDURE DeletePurchCrMemoLines@3(PurchCrMemoHeader@1109400000 : Record 124);
    BEGIN
      PurchCrMemoLine.SETRANGE("Document No.",PurchCrMemoHeader."No.");
      PurchCrMemoLine.DELETEALL;
    END;

    PROCEDURE DeletePurchShptLines@5800(ReturnShptHeader@1000 : Record 6650);
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      PurchShptLine.SETRANGE("Document No.",ReturnShptHeader."No.");
      IF PurchShptLine.FIND('-') THEN
        REPEAT
          PurchShptLine.TESTFIELD("Quantity Invoiced",PurchShptLine.Quantity);
          PurchShptLine.DELETE;
        UNTIL PurchShptLine.NEXT = 0;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE DeleteICReference@4(PurchHeadNoP@1001 : Code[20]);
    VAR
      ImportCostingLineL@1000 : Record 5087001;
    BEGIN
      ImportCostingLineL.SETFILTER("Invoice No.",PurchHeadNoP);
      IF ImportCostingLineL.FINDSET THEN REPEAT
        ImportCostingLineL."Invoice No." := '';
        ImportCostingLineL."Invoice Line No." := 0;
        ImportCostingLineL.MODIFY;
      UNTIL ImportCostingLineL.NEXT = 0;
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA033259   07.08.12 AI Deletion of Start/Stop History in Code, update copyright and Version List.
    }
    END.
  }
}
